query:

VALUES (
  'dryrun-earnings-q1-2026',
  'Q1 2026 Earnings Call — Dry Run',
  'CuraLive Inc.',
  'Microsoft Teams',
  'upcoming',
  NULL,
  NOW(),
  NOW()
)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE

  company = 'CuraLive Inc.',
  platform = 'Microsoft Teams',
  status = 'upcoming';
